title: Treptel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Treptel''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|CSA]] garrison base on [[Brosi]]. It was located near [[Mailor]], and in the influence area of the [[Brosin Underground]] around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
